name: Caernarfonshire (United Kingdom, historic)
description: A green field bearing three gold (yellow) eagles displayed.
history: Based on the arms attributed to Owain Gwynedd, the medieval king of Gwynedd; recognised by the Flag Institute as the flag of the historic county of Caernarfonshire.

features.symbolism: from the medieval arms attributed to Owain Gwynedd, King of Gwynedd
